title: What Comes Next for Iran
description: Panelists joined to discuss what the signing of an agreement between the U.S. and Iran could mean for the two countries, and more.
author: The Editors

title: Why Adventure Matters
description: Adventure may have less to do with where you go than with your willingness to leave the familiar behind.
author: Rafaela Jinich

title: Are GLP-1s Performance-Enhancing Drugs?
description: A weight-loss medication eased Serena Williams’s comeback. Experts can’t agree on whether that counts as doping.
author: Nicholas Florko

title: This Founding Father Died in Disgrace. But He Can’t Be Forgotten.
description: Excluded from America’s origin story, James Wilson may have been the most influential, prescient, and democratic drafter of the Constitution.
author: Jesse Wegman

title: The Curse of Too Much Evidence
description: While researching a woman who went deep on the JFK assassination, I was pulled in too.
author: Kaitlyn Tiffany

title: The Wall the Tohono O’odham Don’t Want
description: Trump threatens native sovereignty in Arizona.
author: Geraldo L. Cadava

title: The Myth of SpaceX
description: The company has mutated into something that defies both comparison and logic.
author: Charlie Warzel

title: Trump’s Second Gamble on Iran
description: If the regime can’t be dislodged by force, maybe it can be bribed.
author: Karim Sadjadpour

title: Iran Got a Great Deal That It Could Still Squander
description: For some forces in Iran, no agreement is a good agreement with the United States.
author: Arash Azizi

title: Science Has a Name for What’s Plaguing the Reflecting Pool
description: Testing reveals that efforts to suppress one algal bloom seem to be fueling another.
author: Matt Viser

title: Mark Rutte Needs to Stop Talking
description: Flattering Trump will get Europe nowhere.
author: Robert Kagan

title: How to Think About AI Before It’s Too Late
description: The case against AI hype with Cory Doctorow
author: Charlie Warzel

title: Britain’s Next Leader Has Emerged
description: Andy Burnham, Manchester’s mayor, prepares to challenge Keir Starmer—and is likely to win.
author: Helen Lewis

title: The Thinkers Who Explain This Baffling Era
description: These philosophers are less arcane—and more relevant—than some readers might think.
author: Boris Kachka

title: What a Juneteenth Boxing Match Revealed About America
description: The 1936 fight between Joe Louis and Max Schmeling was a showdown over global fascism.
author: Vann R. Newkirk II

title: Photos of the Week: Chair Hat, Shouting Choir, Demolition Derby
description: Summer pastures in Turkey, drought conditions in Nebraska, scenes from the World Cup, a “Canyon of Heroes” parade in New York City, a Dragon Boat Festival in Taiwan, and much more
author: Alan Taylor

title: Toy StoryConfronts a Nightmare of Modern Parenting
description: The Pixar franchise’s latest installment makes an enemy out of screen time.
author: David Sims

title: The Massive Implications of the Brendan Sorsby Ordeal
description: The NCAA needs to figure out how to enforce its rules before something goes wrong.
author: Jemele Hill

title: The Price of Defeat in Iran
description: An indeterminate end to a foolish war leaves Americans more disillusioned than ever with engagement in the Middle East.
author: Thomas Wright

title: The Least Logical Fashion Rule
description: Shorts at the office make great sense.
author: Gilad Edelman
